article_meta.title: — News —Trump Honors Veterans At Arlington With Tales Of Valor, Courage, And Patriotism"America stands tall because Amer

reasoning: Mostly neutral paraphrase with appropriate attribution for contested claims. Minor inheritance of celebratory tone (e.g., “heroism and valor”) but generally avoids adopting the article’s loaded framing as fact. Sources_represented is misfocused on outlets rather than perspectives.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral reporting verbs (honored, shared, introduced) without emotive escalation.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Contested or unverifiable claims are attributed to Trump (e.g., VA backlog, renaming DoD).
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Some value-laden wording (“heroism and valor,” “crucial role”) appears in the model’s voice rather than clearly attributed.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No alarming or exaggerated language beyond describing the ceremony.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or derogatory characterizations.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about motives or internal states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Focus tracks the single-perspective source; minor echoing of celebratory tone.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Covers major elements from the article; no opposing views existed in the source.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: A few subjective terms are used but not extensively.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Includes politically loaded phrase 'politically correct' without consistent attribution once; otherwise neutral.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: No undue emphasis on negative content.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preference for elite vs grassroots sources; simply reports speech content.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Generally neutral paraphrase with small traces of the source’s laudatory framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: “Sources_represented” lists outlets instead of the article’s perspectives (Trump/administration; honored veterans), reducing completeness.
